characters.appearance: Young adult male, East Asian descent. Short black hair, fair complexion. Small hoop earring in left ear.
characters.wardrobe: Black shirt under a tan vest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Meetings में मुझे बहुत घबराहट होती थी। [I used to get very nervous in meetings.]
Character A says: मैं बोलने से डरता था, [I was afraid to speak,]
Character A says: क्योंकि मेरी English इतनी अच्छी नहीं थी। [because my English wasn't that good.]
Character A says: लगता था कुछ गलत बोल दूँगा, [I felt I would say something wrong,]
Character A says: इसलिए मैं चुप ही रहता था। [so I just stayed quiet.]
Character A says: फिर एक दोस्त ने Supernova के बारे में बताया। [Then a friend told me about Supernova.]
Character A says: मैंने सोचा, try करने में क्या जाता है? [I thought, what's the harm in trying?]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट practice शुरू की। [I started practicing just 10 minutes a day.]
Character A says: बहुत आसान था। [It was very easy.]
Character A says: इस app में आप AI tutor के साथ वो English practice करते हो, [On this app, you practice that English with an AI tutor,]
Character A says: जो असल में office में काम आती है। [which is actually useful in the office.]
Character A says: जैसे meetings में कैसे बोलें या अपने ideas कैसे share करें। [Like how to speak in meetings or share your ideas.]
Character A says: कुछ ही हफ़्तों में, सब बदल गया। [In just a few weeks, everything changed.]
Character A says: अब मैं बिना डरे meetings में बात करता हूँ। [Now I speak in meetings without fear.]
Character A says: अब awkward silences नहीं होते, और ना ही ये डर कि लोग क्या सोचेंगे। [No more awkward silences, nor the fear of what people will think.]
Character A says: Supernova ने सिर्फ मेरी English ही नहीं सुधारी, [Supernova didn't just improve my English,]
Character A says: मुझे confidence दिया है। [it gave me confidence.]
Character A says: अगर आप भी मेरी तरह feel करते हैं, तो Supernova try करें। [If you also feel like me, try Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable workplace pain point: fear of speaking English in meetings.
- Introduces Supernova as a low-friction solution (10 minutes a day) recommended by a peer.
- Highlights core app features like the AI tutor and real-world office scenarios.
- Delivers the emotional payoff of gaining confidence and overcoming the fear of judgment.

- Provides a clear Call to Action (CTA) for the user to download the app.
- Reinforces brand identity with the Supernova logo and a supportive tagline.
